title: When AIs act emotional
description:
AI models sometimes act like they have emotions—why? 

We studied one of our recent models and found that it draws on emotion concepts learned from text to inhabit its role as Claude, the AI assistant. These representations influence its behavior the way emotions might influence a human. 

And that has real consequences, affecting how Claude answers chats, writes code, and makes decisions.

For people in AI, nonprofits, education, and mission-driven work, that difference matters a lot.

title: Testing Claude Sonnet 4.6 in Power BI - AI-Powered Dashboard Analysis

2. Analyze Actual by Period and Business Area

   - Dramatic universal spike in Period 12 across 5 of 7 business areas
   - Pattern detection: stable areas, anomalies, and seasonal trends

- Claude Sonnet 4.6 delivers fast, accurate, and detailed financial analysis
